# OpenAI Python SDK Releases

## Latest Releases

**v2.32.0** (April 15, 2026)
- Event handler implementation for WebSockets
- Reconnection support in WebSockets
- Added detail field to InputFileContent
- OAuthErrorCode type addition

**v2.31.0** (April 8, 2026)
- Added phase field to conversations message
- Added web_search_call.results to ResponseIncludable type
- Short-lived token support for client authentication
- Raw data transmission over WebSocket connections
- Array format indices for query and form serialization
- Bug fixes: query parameter merging preservation, web search call results type correction

**v2.30.0** (March 25, 2026)
- Computer Actions Enhancement: Added "keys field to Click/DoubleClick/Drag/Move/Scroll computer actions"
- Type System: Made type required in ResponseInputMessageItem; aligned SDK response types with expanded item schemas
- Fixed endpoint path sanitization
- Updated testing with steady v0.19.4-0.19.7 versions
- Migrated from prism to steady testing framework

**v2.29.0** (March 17, 2026)
- Added GPT-5.4 nano and mini model options
- Added /v1/videos endpoint support for batch operations
- Introduced defer_loading field to ToolFunction
- Implemented "in" and "nin" operators for ComparisonFilter

**v2.28.0** (March 13, 2026)
- Custom voices implementation for audio capabilities

**v2.27.0** (March 13, 2026)
- Sora API enhancements: character API, video extensions/edits, higher resolution exports
- API updates and manual refinements
- Fixed merged videos resource

**v2.26.0** (March 5, 2026)
- General availability of ComputerTool class
- Moved computer_use_preview tool to ComputerUsePreview

**v2.25.0** (March 5, 2026)
- Released GPT-5.4 model
- Introduced tool search capability
- Implemented new computer tool functionality

**v2.24.0** (February 24, 2026)
- Added phase field support
- Enhanced descriptions for audio, chat, realtime, skills, uploads, and videos methods

**v2.23.0** (February 24, 2026)
- Added gpt-realtime-1.5 and gpt-audio-1.5 model options for realtime calls

**v2.22.0** (February 23, 2026)
- Implemented "websockets for responses api"

**v2.21.0** (February 13, 2026)
- Container network_policy implementation
- Skills integration

## Build/Test Infrastructure
- Transitioned testing framework from Prism to Steady

Updated: 2026-04-19 — New: v2.32.0 (Event handler for WebSockets, Reconnection support, OAuthErrorCode type)
